text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O and I are going to meet at a shrine
to welcome in the new year. This marks her
advance to senior racer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She still hasn't arrived, but then I hear a familiar
voice coming from the main building.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha ha! Ask something of the gods?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: I am accustomed to being worshipped, but the other way around? Well...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: If you insist, I shall come up with something.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hear me, gods. Why not ask me for a favor, hm?
choice_data_list: Opera O, move over to the side, please.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: The side?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I see. Standing at the center makes it seem as
though the masses have come to pray to me
instead.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We hurriedly move to a spot away from the
center...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I must say, it's a perplexing task to think of a wish
the Overlord might ask.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Alas, what could one who has everything, as I do,
possibly desire?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I could demand to be initiated as the Centurial
Overlord, but that is, as you'd expect... asking a
lot.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Have you any ideas?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: And make sure they are overlordly!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
An overlordly desire. If I had to say anything, it
would be...
choice_data_list: A title change to Demon Lord.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ahh, an imperial feast! I will ask the gods to
prepare an assortment of the most lavish
delicacies!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whooosh!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Wh-whoa! My body is moving on its own! Are the
gods guiding me?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Come along, Trainer! Quickly!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She leads me to...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
A ramen shop? And a rather run down one at that.
But a restaurant of Chinese origin all the same.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The roots are identical, so I will dine in the spirit
of the Qing dynasty rulers. In what manner should
I ask...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Master, I request "the works," if you please. This
is the most affluent, I assume.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And add gyoza and fried rice as toppings for
good measure!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Now that is what I call a New Year's special—the Overlord ramen forte!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Opera O eats every last bite of the extra large
ramen put in front of her. She's full of energy!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
A vocational change! Yes, rather than the path of
the Centurial Overlord, the path of the Demon
Lord is also on the table.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
How interesting... A new year is the best time to
try new things, and thus, to the dark side I turn.
Behold, I am the Demon Lord! Heavens, cower
before me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Flash! Rumble, rumble!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha! Come, torrential downpour! Drench
all of humanity, all of Umamusume kind!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ohh! This play tickles far more than I expected! I
feel a level of greatness never before
experienced!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Acting like a demon lord seems to have made
Opera O stronger in every way.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Restore the ruling system of old! Veni, vidi, vici...
and the like, yes?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Of course! It is time to reclaim control from the
modern-day statesmen.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
President, there is a matter we must discuss. It
concerns the organizational structure of this
academy.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I believe it's about time we do away with these
democratically elected leaders and restore the
right of rule to kings.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I was unaware that Tracen Academy was ever a
monarchy...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Listen well. Rule under a king has its superior
points. Such as...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O elegantly lays out her argument.
This exchange with Symboli Rudolf appears to
have expanded her knowledge.
